articles.title: Gold rises in futures trade as investors seek safety amid global uncertainty
articles.description: Gold prices rise as investors seek safety amid global uncertainties, driven by geopolitical concerns and softer crude oil prices.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki WagonR Flex Fuel Unveiled As India's First E85-Compatible Car
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki WagonR is India's first flex car capable of operating on E85 petrol and has been unveiled by Union Minister Nitin Gadkari and Hardeep Singh Puri.

articles.title: Planning to buy a Citroen Aircross X? 5 things you should know before putting your money down
articles.description: The Citroen Aircross X stands out with optional 7-seat, petrol engine choices, modern features and safety equipment, with prices starting at ₹8.89 lakh.

articles.title: Euro Zone Bond Yields Drop Amid Ceasefire Optimism
articles.description: Euro zone government bond yields fell as oil prices mirrored speculative peace deals between Israel and Lebanon, raising hopes of resolving conflicts involving Iran. U.S.-Iran negotiations might stabilize the energy market. This development affects euro zone bond yields and central bank policies significantly.

articles.title: South Korea pledges action to curb volatility as won nears 2009 low
articles.description: South Korea joins authorities in Indonesia and the Philippines in stepping up measures to defend currencies as elevated oil prices hurt the region's importers.

articles.title: E85 is ready to hit the road: Hero MotoCorp launches flex fuel bikes; Puri, Gadkari green light petrol with 85% ethanol
articles.description: Hero MotoCorp on Wednesday launched India's first flex-fuel motorcycles, the Splendor and HF Deluxe — check availability and prices here:

articles.title: Gold Rises in Futures Trade As Investors Seek Safety Amid Global Uncertainty
articles.description: Gold futures on MCX surged ₹926 to ₹1,59,445 per 10 grams for August delivery as investors sought safe-haven assets amid global geopolitical tensions and softer crude oil prices. Comex gold also gained nearly 1% to $4,499.45 per ounce, with traders watching Federal Reserve comments and US jobless data for cues on interest rates and bullion’s next move.

articles.title: Iranian oil slips to discount on poor Chinese demand despite tighter supply
articles.description: Iranian oil prices slipped into discounts for the first time since April, ‌while Russian crude premiums eased as traders cut prices to entice Chinese buyers amid sluggish demand, trade sources said.

articles.title: Sensex recovers 700 points from day’s low, Nifty rises above 23,450. 5 key factors behind market rebound
articles.description: Indian stock markets staged a strong comeback, with Sensex and Nifty recovering significantly from morning lows. Falling oil prices, a strengthening rupee, and potential scrapping of capital gains tax on FPI investments in government securities boosted investor confidence. Broader markets also saw a sharp rebound, indicating positive sentiment despite recent foreign investor outflows.

articles.title: Why India's response to the PM’s call for conservation seems just as K-shaped as its economy
articles.description: Jet-fuel for foreign flights has cheapened while small eateries shut down; LPG consumption has fallen while petrol use has risen. Many citizens are trying to save fuel—even braving metro rides. More folks can chip in, but these sacrifices won’t fix our K-shaped economy.
